violations.description: Gallery image placeholders have no img elements with alt text. The content-bearing images (property photos) provide no text alternatives for screen readers.
Check-in and Checkout date inputs have no programmatically associated <label> elements. The <span> text above them is not linked via for/id.
Guest count <select> has no associated <label>. The <span> text 'Guests' above it is not linked programmatically.
Interactive map placeholder provides no text alternative describing the location or address for screen reader users.
violations.reference_fix: Interactive Map

violations.description: Star ratings (★★★★★, ★★★★☆) convey information only visually. Screen readers read individual star characters. No aria-label provides the numeric rating.

page_description: A vacation rental listing page with photo gallery, booking form, interactive map, and reviews with star ratings. Issues include missing image alt text, unlabeled form fields, inaccessible map, and star ratings without text alternatives.
